settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsHint: We'll let you know at every milestone
settings.notifBlockedBody: Notification permission is turned off in your device settings. Open Settings to enable it.

deleteSheet.title: Delete your account
deleteSheet.body: This can't be undone. Your streak, badges, and leaderboard place will be permanently deleted.
deleteSheet.error: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

sync.conflictLede: Which one do you want to keep? The other is saved to your history.
sync.conflictWarn: This can't be undone. The streak you don't keep is saved to your history.

relapse.warningBody: Your counter will reset to zero, but your past attempts are saved.
relapse.encouragement: A slip isn't the end. Start again — you've got this.

health.title: Recovery
health.subtitle: How your body heals after quitting IQOS
health.emptyBody: Start the counter — you'll watch your body heal step by step right here.

badgesScreen.title: Badges
badgesScreen.startBody: Start the counter — your first badge is ready in 20 minutes.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Save your streak, sync across devices, and join the leaderboard.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account so your progress is saved to the cloud and never lost.
auth.legal: By continuing you agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
auth.error: Couldn't sign in. Please try again.
auth.toggleToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.signOutConfirmBody: Leaderboard and sync pause until you sign back in.
auth.errUserNotFound: No account found with this email.
auth.errEmailInUse: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
auth.errWeakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
auth.errTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

leaderboardScreen.title: Leaderboard
leaderboardScreen.error: Couldn't load the leaderboard. Please try again.
leaderboardScreen.empty: The leaderboard is empty. Be the first to start a streak!
leaderboardScreen.atTop: you're at the top — no one ahead
leaderboardScreen.notRankedBody: Start a streak to see where you stand here.
leaderboardScreen.guestBody: Join the leaderboard and take your place among them with your streak.

tabs.leaderboardGuestHint: Sign in to join the leaderboard.

20min.title: 20 minutes
20min.description: Your pulse and blood pressure begin to drop from the spike nicotine caused.

12h.title: 12 hours
12h.description: Carbon monoxide in your blood returns to normal; your oxygen-carrying capacity recovers.

24h.title: 24 hours
24h.description: The nicotine level in your blood has dropped to nearly zero.

48h.title: 48 hours
48h.description: Your senses of taste and smell start to sharpen.

72h.title: 72 hours
72h.description: Your bronchial tubes relax and breathing gets easier.

5days.title: 5 days
5days.description: The most intense days of withdrawal are behind you — you've cleared the hardest part.

1week.title: 1 week
1week.description: Your body starts adjusting to life without nicotine.

10days.title: 10 days
10days.description: Taste and smell come back noticeably; food tastes better.

2weeks.title: 2 weeks
2weeks.description: Your circulation improves; walking and moving get easier.

1month.title: 1 month
1month.description: Your lung function improves, coughing eases, and your energy starts to recover.

3months.title: 3 months
3months.description: Your circulation and lung function improve markedly.

6months.title: 6 months
6months.description: Your stress and tension ease; your mood becomes more balanced.

1year.title: 1 year
1year.description: Your excess risk of coronary heart disease drops to half that of someone who keeps smoking.
